company.details: ABC Company is a leading software development company specializing in web and mobile applications.

work.details: As a software engineer, I was responsible for developing and maintaining web applications for clients.

projects.title: E-commerce Website
projects.shortSummary: Developed an e-commerce website for XYZ Retail to sell their products online.
projects.summary: Worked as a part of a team to design and develop a scalable and user-friendly e-commerce website using React and Node.js.

projects.title: Mobile App
projects.shortSummary: Built a mobile app for ABC Corporation to enhance their customer engagement.
projects.summary: Collaborated with a cross-functional team to develop a feature-rich mobile app for ABC Corporation using React Native.
